caption: A man wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bowtie, glasses, and a large, grey, peaked wig is seated in a room that resembles a clothing store or studio, with mannequins and framed photos in the background. He wears black headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. In each frame, he is captured from the chest up, speaking with varying facial expressions. To his left, a logo reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST," and a similar logo "BOSS TALK JOY" appears on the right side of the scene. The background remains static, featuring a "LEE" sign and various garments. Across the sequence, the man's mouth moves and his head shifts slightly as he continues to talk, while the camera angle and the surrounding equipment remain constant.
